findings.detail: Read docs/catalog/heartbeats/2026-05-19T17-26-05Z-atlas.json — gi=0.63 mode=yellow source=kv; 12 elevated anomaly labels; seed_result=200 OK; sustain_eligible=false; seed_attempted=true; kv_keys present for core lanes; LEDGER_CIRCUIT_OPEN false.

GET https://mobius-civic-ai-terminal.vercel.app/api/signals/micro 200 — gi=0.668 instrumentCount=40; 11 of 12 ATLAS labels still error or low-score (persistent); NASA APIs health resolved live (score=1). Micro payload cycle C-306 vs integrity-status cycle C-316 (metadata drift).

GET /api/integrity-status 200 — source kv (not mock); global_integrity 0.779 vs ATLAS catalog gi 0.63 (temporal/model divergence); gi_verified false in payload; terminal_status stressed degraded true; cycle C-316 matches heartbeat cycle.
GET /api/epicon/candidates 200 — count 0; no candidates, verification skipped (no POST /api/zeus/verify or /api/epicon/publish).
POST /api/vault/attest HTTP 404 (Next not-found HTML); quorum_status not returned — route absent on deployed surface.
POST /api/agents/journal HTTP 502 — ok=false error=github_403 mirrored_to_kv=false; substrate canon write blocked.

recommendation: External instrument stress remains largely persistent versus the latest ATLAS heartbeat; live micro shows NASA APIs health recovered. Reconcile micro sweep embedded cycle (C-306) with integrity and catalog cycle (C-316). Treat KV GI 0.779 as fresher live-compute than the 17:26Z catalog snapshot 0.63 when triaging. Deploy POST /api/vault/attest to production for C-298 quorum attestation. Restore GitHub token permissions for agent journal dual-write.
